anti_claims: This skill JSON seed does not flip source authority away from the current skill markdown projection.
Resolved operated-standard and acted-on-kind edges are structural route mappings, not proof the skill is complete or used correctly by agents.
Absent mechanism or concept neighbours are residual pressure, not evidence that no such neighbours exist.
Generated graph, health, and atlas projections cannot be read back as source evidence.

omitted: mechanism or concept neighbours not named by typed source mapping
omission_receipt.reason: Skill instance preserves public-safe markdown source identity, digest, and typed route mapping only. JSON parity does not prove full skill-body completeness or runtime correctness.

residual_pressure.reentry_condition: Bind skill.uses mechanism and skill.applies concept edges only when source evidence names ids.

justification.summary: The accepted standard declares this exact propagate skill id, and the resolved mechanism proves the public route-observability boundary through route traces, copied non-secret source bodies, source-module manifests, and receipts without making live-session claims.

statement: Microcosm Agent Route Observability Runtime Refine Standard And Propagate
title: Microcosm Agent Route Observability Runtime Refine Standard And Propagate
triggers: A recurring route-observability rule about public traces, copied non-secret source bodies, route repair fixtures, body-free receipts, or authority ceilings belongs at the standard level.
The change must propagate through instances, validators, receipts, generated lattice projections, and anti-claims without asserting live session behavior.
workflow: Prove the invariant from the accepted standard, organ atlas row, runtime source locus, mechanism evidence, fixture bundle, source-module manifest, and receipt evidence.
Update source standards, validators, receipts, generated projections, and focused checks together so the rule is computed and not asserted.
Leave unsupported live session, private trace, provider execution, browser authority, release, and whole-system correctness claims as explicit residual pressure.
